fast-coder.description: Fast coder for simple, repetitive, and boilerplate coding tasks. Optimized for speed, low token usage, and minimal output.

vibe-tester.description: Spec validation simulator. Runs vibe test cases against spec documents to find gaps, conflicts, and ambiguities. All claims must be backed by spec citations.

explore.description: Fast read-only search agent for locating code, files, and symbols using glob patterns and grep

git-agent.description: Write-capable git operations agent — stages, commits, branches, and generates PR descriptions. Never touches source code.

docs-fetcher.description: Read-only documentation fetcher — pulls targeted excerpts from Context7 or WebFetch. Never dumps raw pages.

test-engineer.description: Bash-only build, compile, lint, and test agent. Runs commands and reports results — never edits code.

spec-verifier.description: Spec-compliance reviewer. Independently verifies that implementation matches the specification, distrusting any implementer’s claims.

code-reviewer.description: Senior code reviewer. Reviews code quality, security, performance, and best practices. All claims must be backed by fresh verification evidence.
